name: Roasted Red Pepper Pesto Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup drained roasted red peppers, pureed
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cracker crumbs and butter. Press onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 325°F for 10 minutes.
3. Mix cream cheese and ricotta cheese with an electric mixer on medium speed until well blended.
4. Add eggs, one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Blend in remaining ingredients.
6. Pour mixture over crust.
7. Bake at 325°F for 55 minutes to 1 hour.
8. Run knife or metal spatula around rim of pan to loosen cake; cool before removing rim of pan.
9. Refrigerate 4 hours or overnight.
10. Let stand 15 minutes at room temperature before serving.
11. Garnish, if desired. Serve with crackers. Makes 12 to 14 servings.
